Reid Drive, 285 Park Lawn, Promenade 2301, 340 Mill Rd all show NO 1-bed inventory currently — likely leased for July
summary.july_1_strategy: Market COOLING. 4 of 33 existing buildings show price drops; 7 show increases (premium condos). Sweet spot = Mimico/Long Branch waterfront under $2,000. New finds widen the pool by ~15 viable options. Call top 5 (Lakewood II, 2335 Lake Shore, Bloordale, Shoreline Towers, Markwood) this week — these have inventory + concessions + pet OK.
summary.data_gaps: condos.ca, rentals.ca, apartments.com, apartmenthomeliving, rentfaster all returned 403 on WebFetch (Cloudflare/anti-scrape). Filled gaps via search + Zumper neighborhood pages. 9 buildings (Miracle, Walden Circle, 760 Lakeshore, Applewood, Sheridan Crossing, Sheridan Manor, Dialogue, Dixie Square, 1011 Lorne Park) need direct phone or in-browser check.
